name: Western Union
description_short: Arabi's Western Union at 7301 W Judge Perez Dr provides fast money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Located at 7301 W Judge Perez Dr in Arabi, LA, Western Union operates as a standalone check-cashing and money transfer location. The Arabi branch maintains convenient operating hours Monday through Wednesday from 7 AM to 5 PM, extending until 6 PM on Thursday and Friday, and opening Saturday from 7 AM to 4 PM (closed Sundays).

This Western Union location in Arabi provides full-service money transfers, check cashing, bill payment services, and prepaid cards. Customers can reach the branch at +1 504-271-3121 to confirm availability or discuss transaction needs before visiting.

For Arabi residents needing quick access to cash or money transfer services, the Judge Perez Dr location offers a reliable option. Bring a valid government-issued ID for check cashing and money transfers—standard requirements for Western Union transactions.
address: 7301 W Judge Perez Dr, Arabi, LA 70032

company_info.headquarters: 7301 W Judge Perez Dr, Arabi, LA 70032

pros: Extensive physical agent network with location finder tool for easy access across the US
Multi-language support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service offerings: money transfers, cash pickup, bill payment, and mobile top-ups
Western Union Rewards program and referral incentive programs
Accepts multiple payment methods including cards and digital wallets
Offers prepaid card products for additional financial access
cons: Money transfer services carry transaction fees that apply to most transfers
Website encountered technical issues (404 errors and Orange wallet unavailability noted during review)
Limited transparency on fee structures and rates directly visible on location-finder page
Geolocation feature requires browser permission and doesn't always function reliably
No information provided about alternative low-cost or fee-free transfer options
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate cash access or money transfers
Immigrants and international workers sending money to family in other countries
Consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking bill payment and financial services
Individuals needing quick cash pickup without a bank account or credit check
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international workers who need accessible money transfer and cash services through physical locations without requiring a bank account. The primary caveat is that transaction fees apply to most money movement services, and consumers should compare rates against other providers before committing to transfers.
services: Receive money on a card option
meta_description: Western Union at 7301 W Judge Perez Dr, Arabi, LA. Fast money transfers and check cashing services.
